doctrinal_gates.statute_or_case_cite: Fla. Stat. §95.11(4)(a) as amended by HB 837
doctrinal_gates.effect_if_fired: Statute-version selector: 2yr post-3/24/2023; 4yr pre. PD remains 4yr. Clock runs from loss date.

doctrinal_gates.statute_or_case_cite: Fla. Stat. §768.81(6) as amended by HB 837 (eff. 3/24/2023)
doctrinal_gates.effect_if_fired: Hard cliff: claimant >50% fault on post-3/24/2023 auto BI → abstain regardless of damages.

doctrinal_gates.statute_or_case_cite: FL common-law anti-subrogation rule; policy omnibus / permissive-user construction
doctrinal_gates.effect_if_fired: Blocking gate, per coverage section: if tortfeasor target overlaps named / omnibus / resident-relative roster under SAME coverage section as paid loss, abstain and route to Coverage.

doctrinal_gates.statute_or_case_cite: Schonau v. GEICO Gen. Ins. Co., 903 So. 2d 285 (Fla. 4th DCA 2005)
doctrinal_gates.effect_if_fired: Conditional gate: limited-fund + insured not made whole + no contractual waiver → cannot subrogate OUT of insured's recovery. Freestanding direct claim against tortfeasor NOT blocked.

doctrinal_gates.statute_or_case_cite: Fla. Stat. §627.7405; §627.732(3); Amerisure v. State Farm, 897 So. 2d 1287 (Fla. 2005)
doctrinal_gates.effect_if_fired: PIP subro barred EXCEPT against commercial-motor-vehicle owners (taxicabs excluded). Classification per §627.732(3) body-type + primary-use, NOT weight.
Hard 30-day gate when tortfeasor liability carrier tenders settlement: UM carrier consents OR advances offer within 30 days. Miss = extinguished.

Hard 30-day gate on claimant's notice of tort action: collateral-source provider asserts reimbursement right in writing or waives. Medicare / Medicaid / WC statutorily excluded from 'collateral source'.

Cap: natural-person owner vicarious BI capped $100K/$300K + $50K PD; conditional $500K econ-only if operator <$500K combined. Cap does NOT apply to direct-negligence (negligent entrustment) — uncapped separate layer.
doctrinal_gates.evidence_ref: owner == operator; vicarious-cap layer not in play

doctrinal_gates.effect_if_fired: Apportionment: recovery from each defendant capped at that defendant's percentage of fault; non-party Fabre defendants on verdict form.

BI tort right for non-economic damages: permanency / scarring / significant function loss. Economic damages above $10K PIP recoverable without threshold. Threshold does NOT apply if tortfeasor lacks PIP-compliant coverage.
Damages-basis: past medicals capped at amounts actually paid (or LOP contracted, or 120% Medicare for uninsured). Strips billed-amount basis. Filing-date triggered.

doctrinal_gates.statute_or_case_cite: AF Reference Guide; AF Rule 1-2; AF Article Second
doctrinal_gates.effect_if_fired: Routing: both carriers signatory AND company-paid damages ≤$100K → compulsory arbitration. Non-signatory or over-cap → litigation or Special Forum. 60-day post-dismissal refile window.

doctrinal_gates.statute_or_case_cite: Public Health Trust v. Valcin, 507 So. 2d 596 (Fla. 1987); Martino v. Wal-Mart, 908 So. 2d 342 (Fla. 2005)
doctrinal_gates.effect_if_fired: Preservation duty: subrogating carrier owes Valcin duty on vehicle / EDR / parts / photos. First-party spoliation tort abolished (Martino) but Valcin presumption + sanctions apply.

doctrinal_gates.statute_or_case_cite: Fla. Stat. §624.155 as amended by HB 837; Harvey v. GEICO, 259 So. 3d 1 (Fla. 2018)
doctrinal_gates.effect_if_fired: Cross-stream: Coverage denied + Recovery pursuing same loss → senior review with mandatory made-whole accounting + denial rationale. HB 837 §624.155(4) safe harbor covers third-party tender only — does NOT extend to Recovery conduct.

doctrinal_gates.statute_or_case_cite: Dade County School Bd. v. Radio Station WQBA, 731 So. 2d 638 (Fla. 1999)
doctrinal_gates.effect_if_fired: Subrogated carrier acquires no greater rights than insured. Pre-tender release / settlement / extinguishing act by insured against tortfeasor (with knowledge of perfected subro) defeats recovery.
doctrinal_gates.evidence_ref: no release / pre-tender settlement signals detected

entries.statute_or_rule_cite: Fla. Stat. §95.11(4)(a) as amended by HB 837

preservation_hold.storage_yard_letter_text: Storage Yard Preservation Notice: do not release, scrap, or otherwise dispose of the subject vehicle, its event data recorder (EDR/ACM), or any physical components without prior written authorization from the carrier. Failure to preserve may give rise to spoliation sanctions under Public Health Trust v. Valcin, 507 So. 2d 596 (Fla. 1987).
